final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: clean, bright, airy, feminine UI mockup; floral accents with purple flowers; soft lighting
Composition: three-column hero layout — left text column, center model, right product display; horizontal benefit cards at bottom
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum; moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle and packaging box
Scene/backdrop: white and soft pink background with floral purple flower accents
Lighting/mood: soft, airy
Color palette: soft pink, white, gold accents
Materials/textures: floating white rounded rectangle stat cards with gold accents; pill-shaped feature badges; horizontal white rounded rectangle benefit cards
Text (verbatim): header logo "LUMEA BEAUTY"; nav links "特徴" "成分" "お客様の声" "使い方" "FAQ"; CTA button "今すぐ試す"; headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"; subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"; feature badges "敏感肌OK" "高保湿" "朝晩使える"; bullet points (pink checkmarks) "美容成分をしっかり届ける" "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" "続けやすいシンプルケア"; CTA buttons "初回限定で試してみる >" "成分をチェック >"; trust badges "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"; stat cards "満足度 96%" "美容成分 5種配合" "愛用者 12,000人突破"; benefit cards "うるおい" "透明感" "使いやすさ"
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible and correctly rendered; stat cards float over product area; feature badges are pill-shaped with small icons; bullet points use pink checkmarks
Avoid:
